subject: refactor(views): split ImportWizard, migrate to shared components, add error boundary
body:
Split ImportWizardView (747 lines) into 4 step sub-components under
views/import-steps/, reducing the parent to ~130 lines. Migrated all 9
view files to use shared ErrorAlert/LoadingSpinner/EmptyState components,
eliminating 15+ instances of duplicated markup. Added ErrorBoundary to
wrap RouterView and prevent white-screen crashes. Optimized category
autocomplete to use Dexie index queries. Added 19 exportImport tests.

Tags: refactoring, testing, architecture, a11y, ux
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-cleanup
Semver: patch
